hero.desc_zh: Committed to creating quality, creating happiness
hero.desc_en: We are committed to creating quality and happiness

intro.p1: Founded in 2013, Hummingbird Interactive focuses on future mobility experiences.
intro.p2: We revolutionize driving with smart entertainment, expand 3D traffic with low-altitude flight tech, and safeguard safety with AI patrols.
intro.p3: We are committed to every mobile space—whether in-car, outdoors, or in the air,
intro.p4: Creating smarter, more enjoyable, and safer future experiences for users.

c1.title: Smart Mobility
c1.desc: Deeply engaged in IoV technology, providing full-stack solutions like smart entertainment, HMI, and smart cabin VPA for dozens of OEMs.
c1.l1: Comprehensive product development system covering from requirements to delivery.
c1.l2: Deeply adapted to various mainstream automotive chips and operating systems.
c1.l3: Rich in-car content ecosystem to meet users' diverse needs.
c1.l4: AI voice assistant and digital human interaction for an immersive cabin experience.

c2.title: FunCar
c2.desc: A complete in-car entertainment platform equipped with multiple premium games, redefining the travel entertainment experience.
c2.l1: Play multiple premium games anytime, making the journey no longer monotonous.
c2.l2: Complete social and personal center functions to create an exclusive space.
c2.l3: Supports multi-hardware platform adaptation, compatible with mainstream head units.
c2.l4: Rich audio-visual entertainment content to meet visual and auditory needs.

c3.title: Low-altitude Flight
c3.desc: Creating a closed-loop ecosystem of B-end professional training + C-end flight experience to boost the low-altitude economy.
c3.l1: Provide standard and compliant flight training to ensure teaching safety and quality.
c3.l2: Build an efficient and smart low-altitude logistics network to empower industry applications.
c3.l3: Output professional flight technology and qualification certification.
c3.l4: Efficient and smart drone logistics and distribution experience.

c4.title: AI Search
c4.desc: Smart robot security patrol solution, achieving 24/7 continuous smart patrol and real-time monitoring and early warning.
c4.l1: All-terrain adaptability, stable operation in complex environments.
c4.l2: AI smart visual recognition for precise anomaly detection.
c4.l3: Autonomous navigation and path planning to improve patrol efficiency.
c4.l4: Cloud management platform for visual data control.

partners.title: Partners
partners.desc: Establishing long-term strategic partnerships with famous enterprises

quote.l3: From breakthrough social interactions to cinematic audio-visuals, Funcar blends cutting-edge tech with humanized design.
quote.l4: Every journey is full of infinite fun and possibilities.

eco.main_subtitle: Eight core ecosystems for comprehensive entertainment.
eco.game_desc: Funcar's gaming system includes rich genres to meet diverse needs. Whether cloud games, emulators, H5, or local games, Funcar provides a seamless immersive experience.
eco.ktv_desc: Supports Bluetooth mics with a massive song library. Pro audio processing lets you enjoy KTV-level singing in your car.
eco.film_desc: Rich online video resources including movies, TV series, shorts, and anime. Supports HD playback and resume function.
eco.manga_desc: Massive genuine HD comics covering works from multiple regions. Supports online reading and offline downloads.

features.social_desc: Friend system, community plaza, dynamic sharing—building a social circle for car owners.
features.life_desc: Cards, reservations, shopping, and other lifestyle services integrated to be your smart assistant.
features.weather_desc: Real-time forecasts, air quality, travel advice. Precise info helps you plan trips safely.
features.nav_desc: Smart navigation with real-time traffic and multiple route planning. Avoid congestion easily.

scenes.title: Enjoy entertainment anywhere, anytime.
scenes.sd1: Kids can play games or watch anime in the back, while adults relax with KTV.
scenes.sd2: Create a private romantic space to watch movies and listen to music together.
scenes.sd3: Immerse yourself in games or comics during lunch breaks or charging.

hero.title:
Smart Mobility
Every journey is a beautiful expectation
hero.subtitle:
Committed to upgrading 'on-time arrival' to 'beautiful experiences' through smart mobility tech.
Redefining travel—not just about efficiency, but caring for your every mood on the road.

intro.p1: Hummingbird Interactive is an innovative tech company focusing on in-car smart entertainment.
intro.p2: Our business covers smart cockpits, driving entertainment, HMI systems, and IoV software development, along with smart VPA, interactive design, and marketing content production.
intro.p3: With innovative technology and quality services, we continuously drive industry development to create a smarter and more convenient travel experience for users.

pillars.title:
BEYOND
REALITY
pillars.p3_d: Customization centered on user experience and collaborative models.
pillars.p4_d: Multi-sensory synergy (visual, auditory, tactile) and spatial computing.

sec_cockpit.title: Smart Cockpit
sec_cockpit.c1_d: Covers HMI software development, virtual character design, and 3D visual effects.
sec_cockpit.c2_d: Includes central screen, passenger screen, rear screen, HUD, and transparent A-pillar hardware and software.
sec_cockpit.c3_d: Enter Chery's Metaverse, experience four different styled scenarios and smart voice interaction.
sec_cockpit.c4_d: In-car racing game supporting multiple interaction modes like steering wheels and Bluetooth controllers.
sec_cockpit.c5_d: Immersive world combining in-car games with seats, steering wheel, and ambient lighting hardware.
sec_cockpit.c6_d: Assists the design team in developing vehicle exterior, interaction, experience, and virtual test drives.
sec_cockpit.c7_d: VR-based driving training environment to study the impact of driver cognition and emotion on behavior.

sec_ent.c11_d: Control virtual tennis movement through body motions, enjoying the fun of technology.

hero.title:
Application Scenarios
Smart Security Patrol Robot Applications
hero.subtitle: Multi-scenario application · Professional solutions · Safe and reliable

sec1.title: Industrial Energy
sec1.sub: Mining groups, chemical mines, energy companies, safety supervision units
sec1.i1_d: 24/7 smart patrol for substations. Robots autonomously check equipment status, monitor temperature, and recognize abnormal sounds.
sec1.i2_d: Robotic dogs enter narrow spaces equipped with AI cameras to detect cracks and leaks.
sec1.i3_d: Drones perform blind-spot-free aerial patrols while robotic dogs cover the ground. AI compares data to identify equipment anomalies or intrusions.
sec1.i4_d: AI reads meters and detects abnormal gas concentrations, automatically reporting to the control center.

sec2.title: Field Rescue
sec2.sub: Forest fire brigades, mountaineering rescue associations, outdoor emergency centers
sec2.i1_d: Drones use infrared vision to lock onto heat sources, while robotic dogs traverse complex terrains to approach targets.
sec2.i2_d: Drones deploy relay nodes to provide communication support for rescues in remote areas.
sec2.i3_d: AI identifies smoke, fire points, and wind direction, automatically triggering warnings.
sec2.i4_d: Automated material transport and lifeline towing for trapped personnel in complex landscapes.

sec3.title: Emergency Safety
sec3.sub: Emergency Management Department, Fire Rescue Corps, Armed Police Forces
sec3.i1_d: During earthquakes or floods, AI locates trapped people via image recognition; drones scan heat sources, and robotic dogs search near the ground in ruins.
sec3.i2_d: The AI system aggregates real-time video, location, and environmental data from drones and robotic dogs to the command center.
sec3.i3_d: Combining infrared thermal imaging and LiDAR low-light visual recognition to complete night rescues.
sec3.i4_d: Combining infrared thermal imaging and LiDAR low-light visual recognition to complete night rescues.

sec4.title: Special Operations
sec4.sub: Forest fire brigades, mountaineering rescue associations, outdoor emergency centers
sec4.i1_d: Drones transmit real-time footage of targets while robotic dogs observe closely under cover.
sec4.i2_d: Air-ground coordination for battlefield material resupply.
sec4.i3_d: AI identifies smoke, fire points, and wind direction, automatically triggering warnings.
sec4.i4_d: Drones complete area scanning, and AI reconstructs 3D scenes for tactical planning.

sec5.title: Medical Rescue
sec5.sub: Red Cross, medical emergency centers, mountain hospitals
sec5.i1_d: AI dispatches a mixed fleet of drones and robotic dogs for automated delivery.
sec5.i2_d: AI assesses injuries and matches medical staff to guide on-site first aid.
sec5.i3_d: AI identifies body postures, temperature, and heart rate data to determine survival probability.

sec6.title: Urban Firefighting
sec6.sub: Fire brigades, urban security centers, industrial park safety offices
sec6.i1_d: Robotic dogs equipped with gas and temperature sensors enter danger zones instead of humans.
sec6.i2_d: AI reconstructs the 3D structure of the scene to assist in predicting the possible locations of trapped victims.
sec6.i3_d: AI identifies smoke, fire points, and wind direction, automatically triggering warnings.
sec6.i4_d: Conducting structural deformation detection and hazard patrols in subways and underground utility tunnels.

hero.subtitle: 24/7 Smart Patrol
hero.desc: Smart Robot · All-weather Patrol · Safe and Reliable

intro.title:
Global Smart Search
Reconstructing Search Boundaries
intro.desc:
Integrating the strong ground mobility of robotic dogs, the broad aerial view of drones, and the real-time decision-making of AI networks.
Providing you with unprecedented all-weather, all-terrain smart search solutions.

feat1.title:
Wheeled Robotic Dog
All-terrain Ground Pioneer
feat1.desc: Possesses extremely strong terrain adaptability and load capacity. Acts as a ground mobile base station for close-range reconnaissance, detail confirmation, material transport, and long-term monitoring.

feat2.title:
Drone
God's-eye Scout
feat2.desc: Provides an unparalleled aerial view, quickly covering large areas and breaking terrain limits. Equipped with HD zoom cameras and sensors for rapid scanning and path planning.

feat3.title:
AI Network
Swarm Intelligence Brain
feat3.desc: The smart hub of the system. Achieves real-time, lossless communication between ground and air units. Built-in AI algorithms intelligently analyze data, assign tasks, and track targets.
feat3.tags: Smart Analysis | Autonomous Synergy | Real-time Warning

synergy.title:
AI Network
Swarm Intelligence Brain
synergy.sub_tags: Smart Analysis | Autonomous Synergy | Real-time Warning
synergy.desc: Not a simple stacking of devices, but a deep integration of capabilities. Upon system start, drones launch for wide-area scanning; AI analyzes video streams in real-time to lock suspicious areas. The AI network automatically plans optimal paths, directing drones to provide aerial lighting and navigation for robotic dogs. Robotic dogs arrive at targets for detailed reconnaissance and disposal, transmitting real-time info to the command center.
synergy.c1_sub: Seamless connection between aerial screening and ground confirmation
synergy.c2_sub: Combining aerial views and ground penetration
synergy.c3_sub: System autonomous decision-making reduces human dependence
synergy.c4_sub: Adapts to day, night, and complex environments
synergy.c_desc: Seamless connection between 'rapid aerial screening' and 'precise ground confirmation' is the core mode of modern air-ground rescue systems, achieving an efficient closed loop.

intro.title: CAAC Exam Simulation Training
intro.subtitle: Safe · Low Cost · High Fidelity · Standardized

pillars.p1_d: CAAC promotes digital and simulated training, opening policy dividends.
pillars.p2_d: Pilot shortage exceeds 7M. With low-altitude economy opening, annual demand increases by 1M.
pillars.p3_d: Drone schools and aviation colleges connect directly to improve teaching efficiency and pass rates.
pillars.p4_d: Covering plant protection, logistics, mapping, patrol, and rescue with customized courses.

subject1.title: Subject 1: Theory & Assembly
subject1.subtitle: Mainly tests the mastery of basic knowledge such as laws, flight principles, and aviation meteorology.
subject1.row1_d: Provides 'Practice' and 'Exam' modes. Systematic knowledge covers aviation regulations, meteorology, flight principles, etc. Strictly follows CAAC standards, generating a report immediately upon submission.
subject1.row2_d: Students first select a model to preview the aircraft or recognize parts. Then enter the assembly stage with real-time progress. The system automatically calculates scores upon completion and supports viewing history.

subject2.title: Subject 2: Practical Flight
subject2.subtitle: Tests the 'control' over the drone. Challenges hand coordination, spatial orientation, and psychological quality.
subject2.card1_sub: Maintain hover in designated airspace and complete 360° fixed-axis spin. Meets standards of 'height deviation ≤0.5m, horizontal displacement ≤1m, uniform spin velocity'.
subject2.c1_s1_d: Click 'Hover Calibration' to stabilize the drone at the designated initial altitude.
subject2.c1_s2_d: Maintain stable throttle, slowly push/pull rudder to complete spin at uniform angular velocity.
subject2.c1_s3_d: Stop accurately at the initial point. System automatically generates score and review.
subject2.card2_sub: A key subject testing comprehensive handling, requiring the pilot to fly a standard figure-8 route within designated airspace.
subject2.c2_s1_d: Accurately hover above the center circle within 1 minute, focusing on micro-control training.
subject2.c2_s2_d: Symmetrical and smooth figure-8 route, maintaining uniform speed and fixed altitude.
subject2.c2_s3_d: Return accurately and hover at the starting point after flight, testing landing precision.

bvlos.title: BVLOS — Ground Station Ops
bvlos.subtitle: Scheduled route takeoff, cruise, turning, point landing. Meets 'route deviation ≤50m, altitude deviation ≤5m, command delay ≤2s'.
bvlos.card_sub: Maintain hover in designated airspace and complete 360° fixed-axis spin. Meets standards.
bvlos.s1_d: Build airspace meeting CAAC requirements. Support simulating real electromagnetic interference in urban and mountainous scenes.
bvlos.s2_d: Display attitude, track, battery data. Simulate faults like link interruption and signal delay.
bvlos.s3_d: CAAC official scoring rules. Highlight violations and deduction reasons, providing improvement advice.

modes.title: Training Modes
modes.subtitle: Process for building scientific muscle memory + spatial orientation.
modes.m1_sub: Seamless connection between rapid aerial screening and precise ground confirmation
modes.m1_d: Open, unconstrained practice environment. Control the drone freely with no task limits. Suitable for novices to familiarize with basics or experts to test parameters. Supports free setting adjustments to explore techniques.
modes.m2_sub: Seamless connection between rapid aerial screening and precise ground confirmation
modes.m2_d: Racing challenge gameplay with fixed tracks and checkpoints. Cross and reach the finish line in specified order. Tracks feature obstacles. System auto-records time, testing route planning and high-speed handling.

special.title: Specialized Application Training
special.sub: Training modules for specific economic segments. Simulate real work environments for specific industry skills.
special.c1_d: Master the skills of specialized cleaning drones for PV panels to achieve efficient and safe O&M management.
special.c2_d: Focusing on large areas of farmland, forests, pastures, etc., helping students master route planning and autonomous operation.
special.c3_d: Simulate complex terrains like urban dense areas and mountains to master low-altitude flight and multi-angle shooting.
special.c4_d: Simulate complex scenes like mountains and islands to master takeoff and landing in difficult terrains.
special.c5_d: Focus on facility inspection scenes like roads, bridges, and pipe networks to master hazard troubleshooting.
special.c6_d: Simulate disaster scenes like earthquakes and floods to master rapid takeoff and low-altitude penetration.
special.c7_d: High-simulation training to master racing drone control skills and stunt actions, reducing equipment loss risks.

intro.title:
Fill the Professional Gap
Define Industry Standards
intro.desc:
With strong national policy support, demand in logistics, inspection, and emergency fields is booming.
We are committed to becoming a leading UAV industry ecosystem service provider in China.

dual_core.title: Dual-core Driven Business Strategy
dual_core.sub: Forming a closed loop of 'Training & Certification - Employment - Data Feedback - Training Optimization'
dual_core.desc_a: The 'Driving School' in the UAV field. Delivering qualified talents to the industry and laying a solid safety foundation.
dual_core.desc_b: The 'Uber Freight' in the UAV field. Tapping into a 100-billion-level market and commercializing talent value.

network.title: Air Logistics Network Connecting B2B and B2C
network.sub: Ecosystem model: Building a win-win logistics ecosystem of 'Pilots + Self-operated + Merchants'
network.m1_d: Integrating certified pilot resources in society. The platform is responsible for dispatching and settling pilots per order.
network.m2_d: Self-built fleet + flight center, executing standardized routes to ensure efficiency and safety.
network.m3_d: Third-party logistics access system, platform provides dispatching algorithms and profit-sharing mechanisms.

systems.title: Four Core System Architectures
systems.s3_d: Smart route planning | Multi-task real-time monitoring | Abnormal auto-alarm
systems.s4_d: Order management · Pilot review · Data analysis · Airspace control

process.title: Standardized Service Process
process.sub: Ecosystem model: Building a win-win logistics ecosystem of 'Pilots + Self-operated + Merchants'
process.l1_d: User inputs coordinates, weight, and time
process.l2_d: System finds nearest compliant pilot to push task
process.l3_d: Pilot picks up goods, user tracks in real-time
process.r1_d: Enterprise ERP access or batch import delivery plan
process.r2_d: System assigns self-operated fleet based on payload and weather
process.r3_d: Visual dashboard monitoring, automatic warning for anomalies
process.r4_d: Generate data reports for periodic financial settlement

firewall.title: Building a Security Firewall
firewall.sub: Safe · Low Cost · High Fidelity · Standardized
firewall.p1_d: Real-name registration + CAAC license verification + dynamic face recognition, matching person and ID.
firewall.p2_d: Connecting to CAAC low-altitude coordination interface, auto-avoiding no-fly zones, legal route verification.
firewall.p3_d: Automatic alarm for abnormal data, supporting auto-return/landing, visual center control.
firewall.p4_d: Single order insurance (cargo/third-party) + annual operation insurance (equipment/personal) for full coverage.

loop.title: Multi-dimensional Resource Empowerment · Commercial Closed-loop
loop.sub: Safe · Low Cost · High Fidelity · Standardized
loop.bottom_sub: Platform transaction commission | Self-operated service income | Merchant entry fee | System service fee | Pilot training fee
